# FormMint 2.0.0 — Private model preflight

FormMint 2.0 replaces the original prompt-heavy workbench with an import-first tool for checking and preparing real rigid-accessory model candidates.

## Highlights

- Import GLB, GLTF, or OBJ models entirely in the browser.
- Inspect mesh complexity, bounds, origin, topology, UVs, normals, materials, textures, vertex colors, and skinning.
- Highlight detected open edges and zero-area triangles over the model.
- Create a separate prepared copy that merges meshes, removes collapsed faces, welds duplicate vertices, rebuilds normals, recenters, and safely scales down oversized geometry.
- Export a prepared GLB, privacy-safe JSON report, or viewport PNG.
- Use the redesigned dark interface, procedural Blockout Lab, portable project notes, and Studio handoff checklist.

## Trust boundary

Models stay in browser memory. FormMint does not retain source filenames, upload model data, use analytics, or require credentials. Roblox Studio remains the authoritative validator.

See the changelog and technical-boundaries documentation for full details and limitations.
